_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin is a potent inhibitor of glioma growth.

_contextSnippet: two of the three shRNAmir constructs reduced merlin expression by ~70%... knockdown of merlin expression in U251 cells increased intracranial glioma growth
details: Knockdown of merlin expression by ~70% using shRNA increased intracranial glioma growth and reduced overall survival
